Content: <?php
/**
 * 收租管理系统 - 仪表板控制器
 * 
 * 处理用户仪表板相关请求
 */

namespace App\Controllers;

use App\Core\Response;
use App\Core\HttpException;

class DashboardController
{
    /**
     * 显示仪表板
     * 
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    public function index(): Response
    {
        // 检查用户是否已登录
        if (!auth()->check()) {
            throw HttpException::unauthorized('请先登录');
        }
        
        $user = auth()->user();
        $isAdmin = auth()->isAdmin();
        $isLandlord = auth()->isLandlord();
        
        // 根据用户角色显示不同的仪表板
        if ($isAdmin) {
            return $this->adminDashboard($user);
        } elseif ($isLandlord) {
            return $this->landlordDashboard($user);
        }
        
        // 默认仪表板
        return $this->defaultDashboard($user);
    }
    
    /**
     * 管理员仪表板
     * 
     * @param array $user 用户数据
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    private function adminDashboard(array $user): Response
    {
        // 获取统计数据（这里使用模拟数据）
        $stats = [
            'total_users' => 15,
            'total_properties' => 42,
            'active_contracts' => 28,
            'pending_payments' => 7,
            'total_income' => 125400.00,
            'monthly_income' => 45600.00
        ];
        
        // 获取最近活动
        $recentActivities = [
            ['user' => '张三', 'action' => '创建了新合同', 'time' => '2小时前'],
            ['user' => '李四', 'action' => '支付了租金', 'time' => '4小时前'],
            ['user' => '王五', 'action' => '更新了房产信息', 'time' => '1天前'],
            ['user' => '赵六', 'action' => '注册了新账户', 'time' => '2天前']
        ];
        
        $html = $this->dashboardTemplate('管理员仪表板', $user, $stats, $recentActivities, true);
        return Response::html($html);
    }
    
    /**
     * 房东仪表板
     * 
     * @param array $user 用户数据
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    private function landlordDashboard(array $user): Response
    {
        // 获取统计数据（这里使用模拟数据）
        $stats = [
            'my_properties' => 8,
            'active_contracts' => 6,
            'vacant_rooms' => 2,
            'pending_payments' => 3,
            'total_income' => 45600.00,
            'monthly_income' => 7600.00
        ];
        
        // 获取最近活动
        $recentActivities = [
            ['user' => '租客A', 'action' => '支付了4月租金', 'time' => '1天前'],
            ['user' => '租客B', 'action' => '合同即将到期', 'time' => '3天前'],
            ['user' => '系统', 'action' => '发送了租金提醒', 'time' => '5天前']
        ];
        
        $html = $this->dashboardTemplate('房东仪表板', $user, $stats, $recentActivities, false);
        return Response::html($html);
    }
    
    /**
     * 默认仪表板
     * 
     * @param array $user 用户数据
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    private function defaultDashboard(array $user): Response
    {
        $stats = [
            'welcome' => '欢迎使用收租管理系统',
            'message' => '请等待管理员分配具体角色和权限'
        ];
        
        $html = $this->dashboardTemplate('用户仪表板', $user, $stats, [], false);
        return Response::html($html);
    }
    
    /**
     * 仪表板模板
     * 
     * @param string $title 标题
     * @param array $user 用户数据
     * @param array $stats 统计数据
     * @param array $activities 最近活动
     * @param bool $isAdmin 是否是管理员
     * @return string HTML内容
     */
    private function dashboardTemplate(string $title, array $user, array $stats, array $activities, bool $isAdmin = false): string
    {
        $userName = htmlspecialchars($user['real_name'] ?? $user['username']);
        $userRole = $isAdmin ? '管理员' : '房东';
        
        // 生成统计卡片
        $statsCards = '';
        foreach ($stats as $key => $value) {
            $label = $this->getStatLabel($key);
            $icon = $this->getStatIcon($key);
            $color = $this->getStatColor($key);
            
            $statsCards .= '
            <div class="col-md-4 mb-4">
                <div class="card border-' . $color . '">
                    <div class="card-body">
                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                            <div>
                                <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-2 text-muted">' . $label . '</h6>
                                <h3 class="card-title">' . $this->formatStatValue($key, $value) . '</h3>
                            </div>
                            <div class="display-4 text-' . $color . '">
                                <i class="bi ' . $icon . '"></i>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>';
        }
        
        // 生成活动列表
        $activitiesList = '';
        foreach ($activities as $activity) {
            $activitiesList .= '
            <div class="list-group-item">
                <div class="d-flex w-100 justify-content-between">
                    <h6 class="mb-1">' . htmlspecialchars($activity['action']) . '</h6>
                    <small class="text-muted">' . htmlspecialchars($activity['time']) . '</small>
                </div>
                <small class="text-muted">' . htmlspecialchars($activity['user']) . '</small>
            </div>';
        }
        
        if (empty($activitiesList)) {
            $activitiesList = '<div class="text-center py-4 text-muted">暂无活动记录</div>';
        }
        
        // 生成快速操作按钮
        $quickActions = $isAdmin ? $this->adminQuickActions() : $this->landlordQuickActions();
        
        return '<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>' . $title . ' - 收租管理系统</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/css/bootstrap.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/css/bootstrap-icons.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/css/custom.css">
    <style>
        .dashboard-header {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4f46e5 0%, #7c3aed 100%);
            color: white;
            padding: 40px 0;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .user-avatar {
            width: 80px;
            height: 80px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: white;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 36px;
            color: #4f46e5;
            margin-right: 20px;
        }
        
        .quick-action-card {
            border: none;
            box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
            transition: all 0.3s;
            height: 100%;
        }
        
        .quick-action-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
        }
        
        .quick-action-icon {
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        
        .stat-card {
            border-left: 4px solid;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <nav class="navbar navbar-expand-lg navbar-dark bg-primary">

            <a class="navbar-brand" href="/">
                <i class="bi bi-house-door-fill me-2"></i>
                收租管理系统
            </a>
            <button class="navbar-toggler" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#navbarNav">
                <span class="navbar-toggler-icon"></span>
            </button>
            <div class="collapse navbar-collapse" id="navbarNav">
                <ul class="navbar-nav me-auto">
                    <li class="nav-item">
                        <a class="nav-link active" href="/dashboard">
                            <i class="bi bi-speedometer2 me-1"></i> 仪表板
                        </a>
                    </li>
                    ' . ($isAdmin ? '
                    <li class="nav-item">
                        <a class="nav-link" href="/users">
                            <i class="bi bi-people me-1"></i> 用户管理
                        </a>
                    </li>

                    <li class="nav-item">

                        </a>
                        <ul class="dropdown-menu">
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/profile">
                                <i class="bi bi-person me-2"></i> 个人资料
                            </a></li>
                            <li><hr class="dropdown-divider"></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/auth/logout">
                                <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-right me-2"></i> 退出登录
                            </a></li>

                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
    </nav>

    <!-- 仪表板头部 -->
    <div class="dashboard-header">

Content: <?php
/**
 * 收租管理系统 - 仪表板控制器
 * 
 * 处理用户仪表板相关请求
 */

namespace App\Controllers;

use App\Core\Response;
use App\Core\HttpException;

class DashboardController
{
    /**
     * 显示仪表板
     * 
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    public function index(): Response
    {
        // 检查用户是否已登录
        if (!auth()->check()) {
            throw HttpException::unauthorized('请先登录');
        }
        
        $user = auth()->user();
        $isAdmin = auth()->isAdmin();
        $isLandlord = auth()->isLandlord();
        
        // 根据用户角色显示不同的仪表板
        if ($isAdmin) {
            return $this->adminDashboard($user);
        } elseif ($isLandlord) {
            return $this->landlordDashboard($user);
        }
        
        // 默认仪表板
        return $this->defaultDashboard($user);
    }
    
    /**
     * 管理员仪表板
     * 
     * @param array $user 用户数据
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    private function adminDashboard(array $user): Response
    {
        // 获取统计数据（这里使用模拟数据）
        $stats = [
            'total_users' => 15,
            'total_properties' => 42,
            'active_contracts' => 28,
            'pending_payments' => 7,
            'total_income' => 125400.00,
            'monthly_income' => 45600.00
        ];
        
        // 获取最近活动
        $recentActivities = [
            ['user' => '张三', 'action' => '创建了新合同', 'time' => '2小时前'],
            ['user' => '李四', 'action' => '支付了租金', 'time' => '4小时前'],
            ['user' => '王五', 'action' => '更新了房产信息', 'time' => '1天前'],
            ['user' => '赵六', 'action' => '注册了新账户', 'time' => '2天前']
        ];
        
        $html = $this->dashboardTemplate('管理员仪表板', $user, $stats, $recentActivities, true);
        return Response::html($html);
    }
    
    /**
     * 房东仪表板
     * 
     * @param array $user 用户数据
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    private function landlordDashboard(array $user): Response
    {
        // 获取统计数据（这里使用模拟数据）
        $stats = [
            'my_properties' => 8,
            'active_contracts' => 6,
            'vacant_rooms' => 2,
            'pending_payments' => 3,
            'total_income' => 45600.00,
            'monthly_income' => 7600.00
        ];
        
        // 获取最近活动
        $recentActivities = [
            ['user' => '租客A', 'action' => '支付了4月租金', 'time' => '1天前'],
            ['user' => '租客B', 'action' => '合同即将到期', 'time' => '3天前'],
            ['user' => '系统', 'action' => '发送了租金提醒', 'time' => '5天前']
        ];
        
        $html = $this->dashboardTemplate('房东仪表板', $user, $stats, $recentActivities, false);
        return Response::html($html);
    }
    
    /**
     * 默认仪表板
     * 
     * @param array $user 用户数据
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    private function defaultDashboard(array $user): Response
    {
        $stats = [
            'welcome' => '欢迎使用收租管理系统',
            'message' => '请等待管理员分配具体角色和权限'
        ];
        
        $html = $this->dashboardTemplate('用户仪表板', $user, $stats, [], false);
        return Response::html($html);
    }
    
    /**
     * 仪表板模板
     * 
     * @param string $title 标题
     * @param array $user 用户数据
     * @param array $stats 统计数据
     * @param array $activities 最近活动
     * @param bool $isAdmin 是否是管理员
     * @return string HTML内容
     */
    private function dashboardTemplate(string $title, array $user, array $stats, array $activities, bool $isAdmin = false): string
    {
        $userName = htmlspecialchars($user['real_name'] ?? $user['username']);
        $userRole = $isAdmin ? '管理员' : '房东';
        
        // 生成统计卡片
        $statsCards = '';
        foreach ($stats as $key => $value) {
            $label = $this->getStatLabel($key);
            $icon = $this->getStatIcon($key);
            $color = $this->getStatColor($key);
            
            $statsCards .= '
            <div class="col-md-4 mb-4">
                <div class="card border-' . $color . '">
                    <div class="card-body">
                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                            <div>
                                <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-2 text-muted">' . $label . '</h6>
                                <h3 class="card-title">' . $this->formatStatValue($key, $value) . '</h3>
                            </div>
                            <div class="display-4 text-' . $color . '">
                                <i class="bi ' . $icon . '"></i>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>';
        }
        
        // 生成活动列表
        $activitiesList = '';
        foreach ($activities as $activity) {
            $activitiesList .= '
            <div class="list-group-item">
                <div class="d-flex w-100 justify-content-between">
                    <h6 class="mb-1">' . htmlspecialchars($activity['action']) . '</h6>
                    <small class="text-muted">' . htmlspecialchars($activity['time']) . '</small>
                </div>
                <small class="text-muted">' . htmlspecialchars($activity['user']) . '</small>
            </div>';
        }
        
        if (empty($activitiesList)) {
            $activitiesList = '<div class="text-center py-4 text-muted">暂无活动记录</div>';
        }
        
        // 生成快速操作按钮
        $quickActions = $isAdmin ? $this->adminQuickActions() : $this->landlordQuickActions();
        
        return '<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>' . $title . ' - 收租管理系统</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/css/bootstrap.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/css/bootstrap-icons.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/css/custom.css">
    <style>
        .dashboard-header {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4f46e5 0%, #7c3aed 100%);
            color: white;
            padding: 40px 0;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .user-avatar {
            width: 80px;
            height: 80px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: white;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 36px;
            color: #4f46e5;
            margin-right: 20px;
        }
        
        .quick-action-card {
            border: none;
            box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
            transition: all 0.3s;
            height: 100%;
        }
        
        .quick-action-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
        }
        
        .quick-action-icon {
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        
        .stat-card {
            border-left: 4px solid;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- 导航栏 -->
    <nav class="navbar navbar-expand-lg navbar-dark bg-primary">
        <div class="container">
            <a class="navbar-brand" href="/">
                <i class="bi bi-house-door-fill me-2"></i>
                收租管理系统
            </a>
            <button class="navbar-toggler" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#navbarNav">
                <span class="navbar-toggler-icon"></span>
            </button>
            <div class="collapse navbar-collapse" id="navbarNav">
                <ul class="navbar-nav me-auto">
                    <li class="nav-item">
                        <a class="nav-link active" href="/dashboard">
                            <i class="bi bi-speedometer2 me-1"></i> 仪表板
                        </a>
                    </li>
                    ' . ($isAdmin ? '
                    <li class="nav-item">
                        <a class="nav-link" href="/users">
                            <i class="bi bi-people me-1"></i> 用户管理
                        </a>
                    </li>
                    ' : '') . '
                    <li class="nav-item">
                        <a class="nav-link" href="/properties">
                            <i class="bi bi-building me-1"></i> 房产管理
                        </a>
                    </li>
                    <li class="nav-item">
                        <a class="nav-link" href="/contracts">
                            <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text me-1"></i> 合同管理
                        </a>
                    </li>
                </ul>
                <ul class="navbar-nav">
                    <li class="nav-item dropdown">
                        <a class="nav-link dropdown-toggle" href="#" role="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown">
                            <i class="bi bi-person-circle me-1"></i> ' . $userName . '
                        </a>
                        <ul class="dropdown-menu">
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/profile">
                                <i class="bi bi-person me-2"></i> 个人资料
                            </a></li>
                            <li><hr class="dropdown-divider"></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/auth/logout">
                                <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-right me-2"></i> 退出登录
                            </a></li>
                        </ul>
                    </li>
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
    </nav>

    <!-- 仪表板头部 -->
    <div class="dashboard-header">
        <div class="container">
            <div class="d-flex align-items-center">
                <div class="user-avatar">
                    <i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h1 class="display-6">' . $title . '</h1>
                    <p class="lead mb-0">欢迎回来，' . $userName . ' (' . $userRole . ')</p>
                    <small>最后登录: ' . ($user['last_login_at'] ?? '从未登录') . '</small>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 主要内容 -->
    <div class="container">
        <!-- 统计卡片 -->
        <div class="row mb-5">
            ' . $statsCards . '
        </div>

        <div class="row">
            <!-- 快速操作 -->
            <div class="col-lg-8 mb-4">
                <div class="card">
                    <div class="card-header">
                        <h5 class="mb-0">
                            <i class="bi bi-lightning-charge me-2"></i> 快速操作
                        </h5>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card-body">
                        <div class="row g-3">
                            ' . $quickActions . '
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 最近活动 -->
            <div class="col-lg-4 mb-4">
                <div class="card">
                    <div class="card-header">
                        <h5 class="mb-0">
                            <i class="bi bi-clock-history me-2"></i> 最近活动
                        </h5>
                    </div>
                    <div class="list-group list-group-flush">
                        ' . $activitiesList . '
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- 系统信息 -->
        <div class="card mb-4">
            <div class="card-body">
                <h5 class="card-title">
                    <i class="bi bi-info-circle me-2"></i> 系统信息
                </h5>
                <div class="row">
                    <div class="col-md-6">
                        <ul class="list-unstyled">
                            <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success me-2"></i> 系统版本: 1.0.0</li>
                            <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success me-2"></i> 数据库状态: 正常</li>
                            <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success me-2"></i> 会话状态: 活跃</li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-md-6">
                        <ul class="list-unstyled">
                            <li><i class="bi bi-calendar-check me-2"></i> 当前日期: ' . date('Y-m-d') . '</li>
                            <li><i class="bi bi-clock me-2"></i> 当前时间: ' . date('H:i:s') . '</li>
                            <li><i class="bi bi-server me-2"></i> 服务器: ' . php_uname('n') . '</li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 页脚 -->
    <footer class="bg-dark text-white mt-5 py-4">
        <div class="container">
            <div class="row">
                <div class="col-md-6">
                    <h5><i class="bi bi-house-door me-2"></i>收租管理系统</h5>
                    <p class="mb-0">专为局域网环境设计的租金管理解决方案</p>

    /**
     * 获取统计标签
     * 
     * @param string $key 统计键
     * @return string 统计标签
     */
    private function getStatLabel(string $key): string
    {
        $labels = [
            'total_users' => '总用户数',
            'total_properties' => '总房产数',
            'active_contracts' => '活跃合同',
            'pending_payments' => '待收租金',
            'total_income' => '总收入',
            'monthly_income' => '本月收入',
            'my_properties' => '我的房产',
            'vacant_rooms' => '空置房间',
            'welcome' => '欢迎',
            'message' => '消息'
        ];
        
        return $labels[$key] ?? $key;
    }
    
    /**
     * 获取统计图标
     * 
     * @param string $key 统计键
     * @return string 统计图标
     */
    private function getStatIcon(string $key): string
    {
        $icons = [
            'total_users' => 'bi-people-fill',
            'total_properties' => 'bi-building',
            'active_contracts' => 'bi-file-earmark-text',
            'pending_payments' => 'bi-cash-coin',
            'total_income' => 'bi-currency-exchange',
            'monthly_income' => 'bi-graph-up',
            'my_properties' => 'bi-house-door',
            'vacant_rooms' => 'bi-door-open',
            'welcome' => 'bi-emoji-smile',
            'message' => 'bi-chat-left-text'
        ];
        
        return $icons[$key] ?? 'bi-info-circle';
    }

 32 |         if ($isAdmin) {
 33 |             return $this->adminDashboard($user);
 34 |         } elseif ($isLandlord) {
 35 |             return $this->landlordDashboard($user);
 36 |         }
 37 |         
 38 |         // 默认仪表板
 39 |         return $this->defaultDashboard($user);
 40 |     }

 66 |         ];

123 |      * @param array $stats 统计数据

128 |     private function dashboardTemplate(string $title, array $user, array $stats, array $activities, bool $isAdmin = false): string
129 |     {
130 |         $userName = htmlspecialchars($user['real_name'] ?? $user['username']);
131 |         $userRole = $isAdmin ? '管理员' : '房东';
132 |         
133 |         // 生成统计卡片
134 |         $statsCards = '';
135 |         foreach ($stats as $key => $value) {
136 |             $label = $this->getStatLabel($key);
137 |             $icon = $this->getStatIcon($key);
138 |             $color = $this->getStatColor($key);
139 |             
140 |             $statsCards .= '
141 |             <div class="col-md-4 mb-4">
142 |                 <div class="card border-' . $color . '">
143 |                     <div class="card-body">
144 |                         <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
145 |                             <div>
146 |                                 <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-2 text-muted">' . $label . '</h6>
147 |                                 <h3 class="card-title">' . $this->formatStatValue($key, $value) . '</h3>
148 |                             </div>
149 |                             <div class="display-4 text-' . $color . '">
150 |                                 <i class="bi ' . $icon . '"></i>
151 |                             </div>
152 |                         </div>
153 |                     </div>
154 |                 </div>
155 |             </div>';
156 |         }
157 |         
158 |         // 生成活动列表
159 |         $activitiesList = '';
160 |         foreach ($activities as $activity) {
161 |             $activitiesList .= '
162 |             <div class="list-group-item">

164 |                     <h6 class="mb-1">' . htmlspecialchars($activity['action']) . '</h6>
165 |                     <small class="text-muted">' . htmlspecialchars($activity['time']) . '</small>
166 |                 </div>
167 |                 <small class="text-muted">' . htmlspecialchars($activity['user']) . '</small>
168 |             </div>';
169 |         }
170 |         
171 |         if (empty($activitiesList)) {
172 |             $activitiesList = '<div class="text-center py-4 text-muted">暂无活动记录</div>';
173 |         }
174 |         
175 |         // 生成快速操作按钮
176 |         $quickActions = $isAdmin ? $this->adminQuickActions() : $this->landlordQuickActions();
177 |         
178 |         return '<!DOCTYPE html>

Content: <?php
/**
 * 收租管理系统 - 仪表板控制器
 * 
 * 处理用户仪表板相关请求
 */

namespace App\Controllers;

use App\Core\Response;
use App\Core\HttpException;

class DashboardController
{
    /**
     * 显示仪表板
     * 
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    public function index(): Response
    {
        // 检查用户是否已登录
        if (!auth()->check()) {
            throw HttpException::unauthorized('请先登录');
        }
        
        $user = auth()->user();
        $isAdmin = auth()->isAdmin();
        $isLandlord = auth()->isLandlord();
        
        // 根据用户角色显示不同的仪表板
        if ($isAdmin) {
            return $this->adminDashboard($user);
        } elseif ($isLandlord) {
            return $this->landlordDashboard($user);
        }
        
        // 默认仪表板
        return $this->defaultDashboard($user);
    }
    
    /**
     * 管理员仪表板
     * 
     * @param array $user 用户数据
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    private function adminDashboard(array $user): Response
    {
        // 获取统计数据（这里使用模拟数据）
        $stats = [
            'total_users' => 15,
            'total_properties' => 42,
            'active_contracts' => 28,
            'pending_payments' => 7,
            'total_income' => 125400.00,
            'monthly_income' => 45600.00
        ];
        
        // 获取最近活动
        $recentActivities = [
            ['user' => '张三', 'action' => '创建了新合同', 'time' => '2小时前'],
            ['user' => '李四', 'action' => '支付了租金', 'time' => '4小时前'],
            ['user' => '王五', 'action' => '更新了房产信息', 'time' => '1天前'],
            ['user' => '赵六', 'action' => '注册了新账户', 'time' => '2天前']
        ];
        
        $html = $this->dashboardTemplate('管理员仪表板', $user, $stats, $recentActivities, true);
        return Response::html($html);
    }
    
    /**
     * 房东仪表板
     * 
     * @param array $user 用户数据
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    private function landlordDashboard(array $user): Response
    {
        // 获取统计数据（这里使用模拟数据）
        $stats = [
            'my_properties' => 8,
            'active_contracts' => 6,
            'vacant_rooms' => 2,
            'pending_payments' => 3,
            'total_income' => 45600.00,
            'monthly_income' => 7600.00
        ];
        
        // 获取最近活动
        $recentActivities = [
            ['user' => '租客A', 'action' => '支付了4月租金', 'time' => '1天前'],
            ['user' => '租客B', 'action' => '合同即将到期', 'time' => '3天前'],
            ['user' => '系统', 'action' => '发送了租金提醒', 'time' => '5天前']
        ];
        
        $html = $this->dashboardTemplate('房东仪表板', $user, $stats, $recentActivities, false);
        return Response::html($html);
    }
    
    /**
     * 默认仪表板
     * 
     * @param array $user 用户数据
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    private function defaultDashboard(array $user): Response
    {
        $stats = [
            'welcome' => '欢迎使用收租管理系统',
            'message' => '请等待管理员分配具体角色和权限'
        ];
        
        $html = $this->dashboardTemplate('用户仪表板', $user, $stats, [], false);
        return Response::html($html);
    }
    
    /**
     * 仪表板模板
     * 
     * @param string $title 标题
     * @param array $user 用户数据
     * @param array $stats 统计数据
     * @param array $activities 最近活动
     * @param bool $isAdmin 是否是管理员
     * @return string HTML内容
     */
    private function dashboardTemplate(string $title, array $user, array $stats, array $activities, bool $isAdmin = false): string
    {
        $userName = htmlspecialchars($user['real_name'] ?? $user['username']);
        $userRole = $isAdmin ? '管理员' : '房东';
        
        // 生成统计卡片
        $statsCards = '';
        foreach ($stats as $key => $value) {
            $label = $this->getStatLabel($key);
            $icon = $this->getStatIcon($key);
            $color = $this->getStatColor($key);
            
            $statsCards .= '
            <div class="col-md-4 mb-4">
                <div class="card border-' . $color . '">
                    <div class="card-body">
                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                            <div>
                                <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-2 text-muted">' . $label . '</h6>
                                <h3 class="card-title">' . $this->formatStatValue($key, $value) . '</h3>
                            </div>
                            <div class="display-4 text-' . $color . '">
                                <i class="bi ' . $icon . '"></i>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>';
        }
        
        // 生成活动列表
        $activitiesList = '';
        foreach ($activities as $activity) {
            $activitiesList .= '
            <div class="list-group-item">
                <div class="d-flex w-100 justify-content-between">
                    <h6 class="mb-1">' . htmlspecialchars($activity['action']) . '</h6>
                    <small class="text-muted">' . htmlspecialchars($activity['time']) . '</small>
                </div>
                <small class="text-muted">' . htmlspecialchars($activity['user']) . '</small>
            </div>';
        }
        
        if (empty($activitiesList)) {
            $activitiesList = '<div class="text-center py-4 text-muted">暂无活动记录</div>';
        }
        
        // 生成快速操作按钮
        $quickActions = $isAdmin ? $this->adminQuickActions() : $this->landlordQuickActions();
        
        return '<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>' . $title . ' - 收租管理系统</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/css/bootstrap.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/css/bootstrap-icons.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/css/custom.css">
    <style>
        .dashboard-header {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4f46e5 0%, #7c3aed 100%);
            color: white;
            padding: 40px 0;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .user-avatar {
            width: 80px;
            height: 80px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: white;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 36px;
            color: #4f46e5;
            margin-right: 20px;
        }
        
        .quick-action-card {
            border: none;
            box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
            transition: all 0.3s;
            height: 100%;
        }
        
        .quick-action-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
        }
        
        .quick-action-icon {
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        
        .stat-card {
            border-left: 4px solid;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- 导航栏 -->
    <nav class="navbar navbar-expand-lg navbar-dark bg-primary">
        <div class="container">
            <a class="navbar-brand" href="/">
                <i class="bi bi-house-door-fill me-2"></i>
                收租管理系统
            </a>
            <button class="navbar-toggler" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#navbarNav">
                <span class="navbar-toggler-icon"></span>
            </button>
            <div class="collapse navbar-collapse" id="navbarNav">
                <ul class="navbar-nav me-auto">
                    <li class="nav-item">
                        <a class="nav-link active" href="/dashboard">
                            <i class="bi bi-speedometer2 me-1"></i> 仪表板
                        </a>
                    </li>
                    ' . ($isAdmin ? '
                    <li class="nav-item">
                        <a class="nav-link" href="/users">
                            <i class="bi bi-people me-1"></i> 用户管理
                        </a>
                    </li>
                    ' : '') . '
                    <li class="nav-item">
                        <a class="nav-link" href="/properties">
                            <i class="bi bi-building me-1"></i> 房产管理
                        </a>
                    </li>
                    <li class="nav-item">
                        <a class="nav-link" href="/contracts">
                            <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text me-1"></i> 合同管理
                        </a>
                    </li>
                </ul>
                <ul class="navbar-nav">
                    <li class="nav-item dropdown">
                        <a class="nav-link dropdown-toggle" href="#" role="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown">
                            <i class="bi bi-person-circle me-1"></i> ' . $userName . '
                        </a>
                        <ul class="dropdown-menu">
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/profile">
                                <i class="bi bi-person me-2"></i> 个人资料
                            </a></li>
                            <li><hr class="dropdown-divider"></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/auth/logout">
                                <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-right me-2"></i> 退出登录
                            </a></li>
                        </ul>
                    </li>
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
    </nav>

    <!-- 仪表板头部 -->
    <div class="dashboard-header">
        <div class="container">
            <div class="d-flex align-items-center">
                <div class="user-avatar">
                    <i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h1 class="display-6">' . $title . '</h1>
                    <p class="lead mb-0">欢迎回来，' . $userName . ' (' . $userRole . ')</p>
                    <small>最后登录: ' . ($user['last_login_at'] ?? '从未登录') . '</small>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 主要内容 -->
    <div class="container">
        <!-- 统计卡片 -->
        <div class="row mb-5">
            ' . $statsCards . '
        </div>

        <div class="row">
            <!-- 快速操作 -->
            <div class="col-lg-8 mb-4">
                <div class="card">
                    <div class="card-header">
                        <h5 class="mb-0">
                            <i class="bi bi-lightning-charge me-2"></i> 快速操作
                        </h5>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card-body">
                        <div class="row g-3">
                            ' . $quickActions . '
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 最近活动 -->
            <div class="col-lg-4 mb-4">
                <div class="card">
                    <div class="card-header">
                        <h5 class="mb-0">
                            <i class="bi bi-clock-history me-2"></i> 最近活动
                        </h5>
                    </div>
                    <div class="list-group list-group-flush">
                        ' . $activitiesList . '
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- 系统信息 -->
        <div class="card mb-4">
            <div class="card-body">
                <h5 class="card-title">
                    <i class="bi bi-info-circle me-2"></i> 系统信息
                </h5>
                <div class="row">
                    <div class="col-md-6">
                        <ul class="list-unstyled">
                            <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success me-2"></i> 系统版本: 1.0.0</li>
                            <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success me-2"></i> 数据库状态: 正常</li>
                            <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success me-2"></i> 会话状态: 活跃</li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-md-6">
                        <ul class="list-unstyled">
                            <li><i class="bi bi-calendar-check me-2"></i> 当前日期: ' . date('Y-m-d') . '</li>
                            <li><i class="bi bi-clock me-2"></i> 当前时间: ' . date('H:i:s') . '</li>
                            <li><i class="bi bi-server me-2"></i> 服务器: ' . php_uname('n') . '</li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 页脚 -->
    <footer class="bg-dark text-white mt-5 py-4">
        <div class="container">
            <div class="row">
                <div class="col-md-6">
                    <h5><i class="bi bi-house-door me-2"></i>收租管理系统</h5>
                    <p class="mb-0">专为局域网环境设计的租金管理解决方案</p>
                    <small class="text-muted">版本 1.0.0 · 开发中</small>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-6 text-end">
                    <p class="mb-1">
                        <i class="bi bi-cpu me-1"></i> PHP ' . PHP_VERSION . ' & MariaDB
                    </p>
                    <p class="mb-0">
                        <i class="bi bi-bootstrap me-1"></i> Bootstrap 5.3 (本地化)
                    </p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <hr class="bg-secondary">
            <div class="text-center">
                <small>&copy; 2026 收租管理系统. 所有资源均已本地化，支持离线使用.</small>
            </div>
        </div>
    </footer>

    <script src="/assets/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
    <script src="/assets/js/app.js"></script>
    <script>
        // 页面加载完成
        document.addEventListener(\'DOMContentLoaded\', function() {
            console.log(\'仪表板已加载\');
            
            // 更新页面标题
            document.title = \'' . $title . ' - 收租管理系统\';
            
            // 初始化工具提示
            if (typeof bootstrap !== \'undefined\') {
                var tooltipTriggerList = [].slice.call(document.querySelectorAll(\'[data-bs-toggle="tooltip"]\'));
                tooltipTriggerList.map(function(tooltipTriggerEl) {
                    return new bootstrap.Tooltip(tooltipTriggerEl);
                });
            }
        });
    </script>
</body>
</html>';

    /**
     * 获取统计标签
     * 
     * @param string $key 统计键
     * @return string 统计标签
     */
    private function getStatLabel(string $key): string
    {
        $labels = [
            'total_users' => '总用户数',
            'total_properties' => '总房产数',
            'active_contracts' => '活跃合同',
            'pending_payments' => '待收租金',
            'total_income' => '总收入',
            'monthly_income' => '本月收入',
            'my_properties' => '我的房产',
            'vacant_rooms' => '空置房间',
            'welcome' => '欢迎',
            'message' => '消息'
        ];
        
        return $labels[$key] ?? $key;
    }
    
    /**
     * 获取统计图标
     * 
     * @param string $key 统计键
     * @return string 统计图标
     */
    private function getStatIcon(string $key): string
    {
        $icons = [
            'total_users' => 'bi-people-fill',
            'total_properties' => 'bi-building',
            'active_contracts' => 'bi-file-earmark-text',
            'pending_payments' => 'bi-cash-coin',
            'total_income' => 'bi-currency-exchange',
            'monthly_income' => 'bi-graph-up',
            'my_properties' => 'bi-house-door',
            'vacant_rooms' => 'bi-door-open',
            'welcome' => 'bi-emoji-smile',
            'message' => 'bi-chat-left-text'
        ];
        
        return $icons[$key] ?? 'bi-info-circle';
    }

    /**
     * 获取统计颜色
=======
    /**
     * 获取统计颜色
     * 
     * @param string $key 统计键
     * @return string 统计颜色
     */
    private function getStatColor(string $key): string
    {
        $colors = [
            'total_users' => 'primary',
            'total_properties' => 'success',
            'active_contracts' => 'info',
            'pending_payments' => 'warning',
            'total_income' => 'danger',
            'monthly_income' => 'primary',
            'my_properties' => 'success',
            'vacant_rooms' => 'warning',
            'welcome' => 'info',
            'message' => 'secondary'
        ];
        
        return $colors[$key] ?? 'secondary';
    }
    
    /**
     * 格式化统计值
     * 
     * @param string $key 统计键
     * @param mixed $value 统计值
     * @return string 格式化后的值
     */
    private function formatStatValue(string $key, $value): string
    {
        if (strpos($key, 'income') !== false || strpos($key, 'total_income') !== false || strpos($key, 'monthly_income') !== false) {
            return '¥' . number_format($value, 2);
        }
        
        if (is_numeric($value)) {
            return number_format($value);
        }
        
        return htmlspecialchars($value);
    }
    
    /**
     * 管理员快速操作
     * 
     * @return string HTML内容
     */
    private function adminQuickActions(): string
    {
        $actions = [
            ['icon' => 'bi-person-plus', 'title' => '添加用户', 'description' => '添加新用户账户', 'url' => '/users/create', 'color' => 'primary'],
            ['icon' => 'bi-building-add', 'title' => '添加房产', 'description' => '添加新的房产信息', 'url' => '/properties/create', 'color' => 'success'],
            ['icon' => 'bi-file-earmark-plus', 'title' => '创建合同', 'description' => '创建新的租赁合同', 'url' => '/contracts/create', 'color' => 'info'],
            ['icon' => 'bi-cash-coin', 'title' => '租金管理', 'description' => '查看和管理租金支付', 'url' => '/payments', 'color' => 'warning'],
            ['icon' => 'bi-graph-up', 'title' => '财务报表', 'description' => '查看财务统计报表', 'url' => '/reports/financial', 'color' => 'danger'],
            ['icon' => 'bi-gear', 'title' => '系统设置', 'description' => '管理系统配置', 'url' => '/settings', 'color' => 'secondary']
        ];
        
        $html = '';
        foreach ($actions as $action) {
            $html .= '
            <div class="col-md-4">
                <a href="' . $action['url'] . '" class="card quick-action-card text-decoration-none">
                    <div class="card-body text-center">
                        <div class="quick-action-icon text-' . $action['color'] . '">
                            <i class="bi ' . $action['icon'] . '"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h5 class="card-title">' . $action['title'] . '</h5>
                        <p class="card-text text-muted">' . $action['description'] . '</p>
                    </div>
                </a>
            </div>';
        }
        
        return $html;
    }
    
    /**
     * 房东快速操作
     * 
     * @return string HTML内容
     */
    private function landlordQuickActions(): string
    {
        $actions = [
            ['icon' => 'bi-house-add', 'title' => '添加房产', 'description' => '添加新的房产信息', 'url' => '/properties/create', 'color' => 'success'],
            ['icon' => 'bi-file-earmark-plus', 'title' => '创建合同', 'description' => '创建新的租赁合同', 'url' => '/contracts/create', 'color' => 'info'],
            ['icon' => 'bi-cash-coin', 'title' => '收取租金', 'description' => '记录租金收取情况', 'url' => '/payments/create', 'color' => 'warning'],
            ['icon' => 'bi-calendar-check', 'title' => '合同管理', 'description' => '管理租赁合同', 'url' => '/contracts', 'color' => 'primary'],
            ['icon' => 'bi-bell', 'title' => '发送提醒', 'description' => '发送租金提醒通知', 'url' => '/notifications/create', 'color' => 'danger'],
            ['icon' => 'bi-bar-chart', 'title' => '我的报表', 'description' => '查看个人报表', 'url' => '/reports/personal', 'color' => 'secondary']
        ];
        
        $html = '';
        foreach ($actions as $action) {
            $html .= '
            <div class="col-md-4">
                <a href="' . $action['url'] . '" class="card quick-action-card text-decoration-none">
                    <div class="card-body text-center">
                        <div class="quick-action-icon text-' . $action['color'] . '">
                            <i class="bi ' . $action['icon'] . '"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h5 class="card-title">' . $action['title'] . '</h5>
                        <p class="card-text text-muted">' . $action['description'] . '</p>
                    </div>
                </a>
            </div>';
        }

  2 | /**
  3 |  * 收租管理系统 - 仪表板控制器

  8 | namespace App\Controllers;

 10 | use App\Core\Response;
 11 | use App\Core\HttpException;
 12 | 
 13 | class DashboardController
 14 | {
 15 |     /**
 16 |      * 显示仪表板
 17 |      * 
 18 |      * @return Response 响应对象
 19 |      */
 20 |     public function index(): Response
 21 |     {
 22 |         // 检查用户是否已登录
 23 |         if (!auth()->check()) {
 24 |             throw HttpException::unauthorized('请先登录');
 25 |         }
 26 |         
 27 |         $user = auth()->user();
 28 |         $isAdmin = auth()->isAdmin();
 29 |         $isLandlord = auth()->isLandlord();
 30 |         
 31 |         // 根据用户角色显示不同的仪表板
 32 |         if ($isAdmin) {
 33 |             return $this->adminDashboard($user);
 34 |         } elseif ($isLandlord) {
 35 |             return $this->landlordDashboard($user);
 36 |         }
 37 |         
 38 |         // 默认仪表板
 39 |         return $this->defaultDashboard($user);
 40 |     }
 41 |     
 42 |     /**
 43 |      * 管理员仪表板
 44 |      * 
 45 |      * @param array $user 用户数据
 46 |      * @return Response 响应对象
 47 |      */
 48 |     private function adminDashboard(array $user): Response
 49 |     {
 50 |         // 获取统计数据（这里使用模拟数据）
 51 |         $stats = [
 52 |             'total_users' => 15,
 53 |             'total_properties' => 42,
 54 |             'active_contracts' => 28,
 55 |             'pending_payments' => 7,
 56 |             'total_income' => 125400.00,
 57 |             'monthly_income' => 45600.00
 58 |         ];
 59 |         
 60 |         // 获取最近活动
 61 |         $recentActivities = [
 62 |             ['user' => '张三', 'action' => '创建了新合同', 'time' => '2小时前'],
 63 |             ['user' => '李四', 'action' => '支付了租金', 'time' => '4小时前'],
 64 |             ['user' => '王五', 'action' => '更新了房产信息', 'time' => '1天前'],
 65 |             ['user' => '赵六', 'action' => '注册了新账户', 'time' => '2天前']
 66 |         ];
 67 |         
 68 |         $html = $this->dashboardTemplate('管理员仪表板', $user, $stats, $recentActivities, true);
 69 |         return Response::html($html);
 70 |     }
 71 |     
 72 |     /**
 73 |      * 房东仪表板
 74 |      * 
 75 |      * @param array $user 用户数据
 76 |      * @return Response 响应对象
 77 |      */
 78 |     private function landlordDashboard(array $user): Response
 79 |     {
 80 |         // 获取统计数据（这里使用模拟数据）
 81 |         $stats = [
 82 |             'my_properties' => 8,
 83 |             'active_contracts' => 6,
 84 |             'vacant_rooms' => 2,
 85 |             'pending_payments' => 3,
 86 |             'total_income' => 45600.00,
 87 |             'monthly_income' => 7600.00
 88 |         ];
 89 |         
 90 |         // 获取最近活动
 91 |         $recentActivities = [
 92 |             ['user' => '租客A', 'action' => '支付了4月租金', 'time' => '1天前'],
 93 |             ['user' => '租客B', 'action' => '合同即将到期', 'time' => '3天前'],
 94 |             ['user' => '系统', 'action' => '发送了租金提醒', 'time' => '5天前']
 95 |         ];
 96 |         
 97 |         $html = $this->dashboardTemplate('房东仪表板', $user, $stats, $recentActivities, false);
 98 |         return Response::html($html);
 99 |     }
100 |     
101 |     /**

103 |      *

111 |             'message' => '请等待管理员分配具体角色和权限'
112 |         ];
113 |         
114 |         $html = $this->dashboardTemplate('用户仪表板', $user, $stats, [], false);
115 |         return Response::html($html);
116 |     }

118 |     /**
119 |      * 仪表板模板
120 |      * 
121 |      * @param string $title 标题
122 |      * @param array $user 用户数据
123 |      * @param array $stats 统计数据
124 |      * @param array $activities 最近活动
125 |      * @param bool $isAdmin 是否是管理员
126 |      * @return string HTML内容
127 |      */
128 |     private function dashboardTemplate(string $title, array $user, array $stats, array $activities, bool $isAdmin = false): string
129 |     {
130 |         $userName = htmlspecialchars($user['real_name'] ?? $user['username']);
131 |         $userRole = $isAdmin ? '管理员' : '房东';
132 |         
133 |         // 生成统计卡片
134 |         $statsCards = '';
135 |         foreach ($stats as $key => $value) {
136 |             $label = $this->getStatLabel($key);
137 |             $icon = $this->getStatIcon($key);
138 |             $color = $this->getStatColor($key);
139 |             
140 |             $statsCards .= '
141 |             <div class="col-md-4 mb-4">
142 |                 <div class="card border-' . $color . '">
143 |                     <div class="card-body">
144 |                         <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
145 |                             <div>
146 |                                 <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-2 text-muted">' . $label . '</h6>
147 |                                 <h3 class="card-title">' . $this->formatStatValue($key, $value) . '</h3>
148 |                             </div>
149 |                             <div class="display-4 text-' . $color . '">
150 |                                 <i class="bi ' . $icon . '"></i>
151 |                             </div>
152 |                         </div>
153 |                     </div>
154 |                 </div>
155 |             </div>';
156 |         }
157 |         
158 |         // 生成活动列表
159 |         $activitiesList = '';
160 |         foreach ($activities as $activity) {
161 |             $activitiesList .= '
162 |             <div class="list-group-item">
163 |                 <div class="d-flex w-100 justify-content-between">
164 |                     <h6 class="mb-1">' . htmlspecialchars($activity['action']) . '</h6>
165 |                     <small class="text-muted">' . htmlspecialchars($activity['time']) . '</small>
166 |                 </div>
167 |                 <small class="text-muted">' . htmlspecialchars($activity['user']) . '</small>
168 |             </div>';
169 |         }
170 |         
171 |         if (empty($activitiesList)) {
172 |             $activitiesList = '<div class="text-center py-4 text-muted">暂无活动记录</div>';
173 |         }
174 |         
175 |         // 生成快速操作按钮
176 |         $quickActions = $isAdmin ? $this->adminQuickActions() : $this->landlordQuickActions();
177 |         
178 |         return '<!DOCTYPE html>

477 |             'monthly_income' => 'primary',
478 |             'my_properties' => 'success',
479 |             'vacant_rooms' => 'warning',
480 |             'welcome' => 'info',
481 |             'message' => 'secondary'
482 |         ];
483 |         
484 |         return $colors[$key] ?? 'secondary';
485 |     }
486 |     
487 |     /**
488 |      * 格式化统计值
489 |      *
490 |      * @param string $key 统计键
491 |      * @param mixed $value 统计值
492 |      * @return string 格式化后的值
493 |      */
494 |     private function formatStatValue(string $key, $value): string
495 |     {
496 |         if (strpos($key, 'income') !== false || strpos($key, 'total_income') !== false || strpos($key, 'monthly_income') !== false) {
497 |             return '¥' . number_format($value, 2);
498 |         }
499 |         
500 |         if (is_numeric($value)) {
501 |             return number_format($value);
502 |         }
503 |         
504 |         return htmlspecialchars($value);
505 |     }
506 |     
507 |     /**
508 |      * 管理员快速操作
509 |      *
510 |      * @return string HTML内容
511 |      */
512 |     private function adminQuickActions(): string
513 |     {
514 |         $actions = [
515 |             ['icon' => 'bi-person-plus', 'title' => '添加用户', 'description' => '添加新用户账户', 'url' => '/users/create', 'color' => 'primary'],
516 |             ['icon' => 'bi-building-add', 'title' => '添加房产', 'description' => '添加新的房产信息', 'url' => '/properties/create', 'color' => 'success'],
517 |             ['icon' => 'bi-file-earmark-plus', 'title' => '创建合同', 'description' => '创建新的租赁合同', 'url' => '/contracts/create', 'color' => 'info'],
518 |             ['icon' => 'bi-cash-coin', 'title' => '租金管理', 'description' => '查看和管理租金支付', 'url' => '/payments', 'color' => 'warning'],
519 |             ['icon' => 'bi-graph-up', 'title' => '财务报表', 'description' => '查看财务统计报表', 'url' => '/reports/financial', 'color' => 'danger'],
520 |             ['icon' => 'bi-gear', 'title' => '系统设置', 'description' => '管理系统配置', 'url' => '/settings', 'color' => 'secondary']
521 |         ];
522 |         
523 |         $html = '';
524 |         foreach ($actions as $action) {
525 |             $html .= '
526 |             <div class="col-md-4">
527 |                 <a href="' . $action['url'] . '" class="card quick-action-card text-decoration-none">
528 |                     <div class="card-body text-center">
529 |                         <div class="quick-action-icon text-' . $action['color'] . '">
530 |                             <i class="bi ' . $action['icon'] . '"></i>
531 |                         </div>
532 |                         <h5 class="card-title">' . $action['title'] . '</h5>
533 |                         <p class="card-text text-muted">' . $action['description'] . '</p>
534 |                     </div>
535 |                 </a>
536 |             </div>';
537 |         }
538 |         
539 |         return $html;
540 |     }

我需要创建房产管理模块。这应该包括：
1. PropertyController - 房产控制器
2. Property模型类
3. 相关的视图文件

首先，让我创建PropertyController.php文件。
[Tool Use: write_to_file]
Path: app/Controllers/PropertyController.php
Content: <?php
/**
 * 收租管理系统 - 房产管理控制器
 * 
 * 处理房产管理相关请求
 */

namespace App\Controllers;

use App\Core\Response;
use App\Core\HttpException;

class PropertyController
{
    /**
     * 显示房产列表
     * 
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    public function index(): Response
    {
        // 检查用户是否已登录
        if (!auth()->check()) {
            throw HttpException::unauthorized('请先登录');
        }
        
        $user = auth()->user();
        $isAdmin = auth()->isAdmin();
        $isLandlord = auth()->isLandlord();
        
        // 获取房产列表（这里使用模拟数据）
        $properties = $this->getProperties($user, $isAdmin);
        
        $html = $this->propertyListTemplate($properties, $user, $isAdmin);
        return Response::html($html);
    }
    
    /**
     * 显示创建房产表单
     * 
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    public function create(): Response
    {
        // 检查用户是否已登录
        if (!auth()->check()) {
            throw HttpException::unauthorized('请先登录');
        }
        
        // 检查权限：只有管理员和房东可以创建房产
        if (!auth()->isAdmin() && !auth()->isLandlord()) {
            throw HttpException::forbidden('您没有权限创建房产');
        }
        
        $user = auth()->user();
        
        $html = $this->propertyFormTemplate('创建房产', null, $user);
        return Response::html($html);
    }
    
    /**
     * 保存房产信息
     * 
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    public function store(): Response
    {
        // 检查用户是否已登录
        if (!auth()->check()) {
            throw HttpException::unauthorized('请先登录');
        }
        
        // 检查权限：只有管理员和房东可以创建房产
        if (!auth()->isAdmin() && !auth()->isLandlord()) {
            throw HttpException::forbidden('您没有权限创建房产');
        }
        
        // 这里应该处理表单提交，保存到数据库
        // 暂时模拟保存成功
        
        // 重定向到房产列表
        return Response::redirect('/properties');
    }
    
    /**
     * 显示房产详情
     * 
     * @param int $id 房产ID
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    public function show(int $id): Response
    {
        // 检查用户是否已登录
        if (!auth()->check()) {
            throw HttpException::unauthorized('请先登录');
        }
        
        $user = auth()->user();
        $isAdmin = auth()->isAdmin();
        
        // 获取房产信息（这里使用模拟数据）
        $property = $this->getPropertyById($id, $user, $isAdmin);
        
        if (!$property) {
            throw HttpException::notFound('房产不存在');
        }
        
        $html = $this->propertyDetailTemplate($property, $user);
        return Response::html($html);
    }
    
    /**
     * 显示编辑房产表单
     * 
     * @param int $id 房产ID
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    public function edit(int $id): Response
    {
        // 检查用户是否已登录
        if (!auth()->check()) {
            throw HttpException::unauthorized('请先登录');
        }
        
        $user = auth()->user();
        $isAdmin = auth()->isAdmin();
        
        // 获取房产信息（这里使用模拟数据）
        $property = $this->getPropertyById($id, $user, $isAdmin);
        
        if (!$property) {
            throw HttpException::notFound('房产不存在');
        }
        
        // 检查权限：只有管理员或房产所有者可以编辑
        if (!$isAdmin && $property['owner_id'] != $user['id']) {
            throw HttpException::forbidden('您没有权限编辑此房产');
        }
        
        $html = $this->propertyFormTemplate('编辑房产', $property, $user);
        return Response::html($html);
    }
    
    /**
     * 更新房产信息
     * 
     * @param int $id 房产ID

     */
    public function update(int $id): Response
    {
        // 检查用户是否已登录
        if (!auth()->check()) {
            throw HttpException::unauthorized('请先登录');
        }
        
        $user = auth()->user();
        $isAdmin = auth()->isAdmin();
        
        // 获取房产信息（这里使用模拟数据）
        $property = $this->getPropertyById($id, $user, $isAdmin);
        
        if (!$property) {
            throw HttpException::notFound('房产不存在');
        }
        
        // 检查权限：只有管理员或房产所有者可以更新
        if (!$isAdmin && $property['owner_id'] != $user['id']) {

        }
        
        // 这里应该处理表单提交，更新到数据库
        // 暂时模拟更新成功
        
        // 重定向到房产详情
        return Response::redirect('/properties/' . $id);
    }
    
    /**
     * 删除房产
     * 
     * @param int $id 房产ID
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    public function destroy(int $id): Response
    {
        // 检查用户是否已登录
        if (!auth()->check()) {
            throw HttpException::unauthorized('请先登录');
        }
        
        // 检查权限：只有管理员可以删除房产
        if (!auth()->isAdmin()) {
            throw HttpException::forbidden('只有管理员可以删除房产');
        }
        
        $user = auth()->user();
        $isAdmin = auth()->isAdmin();
        
        // 获取房产信息（这里使用模拟数据）
        $property = $this->getPropertyById($id, $user, $isAdmin);
        
        if (!$property) {
            throw HttpException::notFound('房产不存在');
        }
        
        // 这里应该从数据库删除房产
        // 暂时模拟删除成功
        
        // 重定向到房产列表
        return Response::redirect('/properties');

    /**
     * 获取房产列表
     * 
     * @param array $user 用户数据
     * @param bool $isAdmin 是否是管理员
     * @return array 房产列表
     */
    private function getProperties(array $user, bool $isAdmin): array
    {
        // 模拟数据
        $properties = [
            [
                'id' => 1,
                'name' => '阳光小区1号楼',
                'address' => '北京市朝阳区阳光路1号',
                'type' => '住宅',

                'owner_name' => '张三',
                'owner_id' => 2,
                'created_at' => '2026-01-15',
                'status' => '正常'
            ],
            [
                'id' => 2,
                'name' => '商业中心A座',
                'address' => '上海市浦东新区商业路100号',
                'type' => '商业',
                'total_rooms' => 8,
                'occupied_rooms' => 6,
                'vacant_rooms' => 2,
                'monthly_rent' => 8500.00,
                'total_value' => 10200000.00,

                'created_at' => '2026-02-20',
                'status' => '正常'
            ],
            [
                'id' => 3,
                'name' => '温馨家园3单元',
                'address' => '广州市天河区温馨路88号',
                'type' => '住宅',
                'total_rooms' => 6,
                'occupied_rooms' => 4,
                'vacant_rooms' => 2,
                'monthly_rent' => 2800.00,
                'total_value' => 3360000.00,
                'owner_name' => '王五',
                'owner_id' => 4,
                'created_at' => '2026-03-10',
                'status' => '正常'
            ],
            [
                'id' => 4,
                'name' => '写字楼B栋',
                'address' => '深圳市南山区科技园路200号',
                'type' => '办公',
                'total_rooms' => 15,
                'occupied_rooms' => 10,
                'vacant_rooms' => 5,
                'monthly_rent' => 12000.00,
                'total_value' => 14400000.00,
                'owner_name' => '赵六',
                'owner_id' => 5,
                'created_at' => '2026-01-30',
                'status' => '正常'
            ],
            [
                'id' => 5,
                'name' => '学生公寓C区',
                'address' => '武汉市洪山区大学城路50号',
                'type' => '公寓',
                'total_rooms' => 20,
                'occupied_rooms' => 18,
                'vacant_rooms' => 2,
                'monthly_rent' => 1500.00,
                'total_value' => 1800000.00,
                'owner_name' => '孙七',
                'owner_id' => 6,
                'created_at' => '2026-02-15',
                'status' => '正常'
            ]
        ];
        
        // 如果不是管理员，只返回自己拥有的房产
        if (!$isAdmin) {
            $properties = array_filter($properties, function($property) use ($user) {
                return $property['owner_id'] == $user['id'];
            });
        }
        
        return array_values($properties);
    }
    
    /**
     * 根据ID获取房产信息
     * 
     * @param int $id 房产ID
     * @param array $user 用户数据
     * @param bool $isAdmin 是否是管理员
     * @return array|null 房产信息
     */
    private function getPropertyById(int $id, array $user, bool $isAdmin): ?array
    {
        $properties = $this->getProperties($user, $isAdmin);
        
        foreach ($properties as $property) {
            if ($property['id'] == $id) {
                return $property;
            }
        }
        
        return null;
    }
    
    /**
     * 房产列表模板
     * 
     * @param array $properties 房产列表
     * @param array $user 用户数据
     * @param bool $isAdmin 是否是管理员
     * @return string HTML内容
     */
    private function propertyListTemplate(array $properties, array $user, bool $isAdmin): string
    {
        $userName = htmlspecialchars($user['real_name'] ?? $user['username']);
        $canCreate = $isAdmin || auth()->isLandlord();
        
        // 生成房产表格
        $propertiesTable = '';
        if (empty($properties)) {
            $propertiesTable = '
            <div class="alert alert-info">
                <i class="bi bi-info-circle me-2"></i>
                暂无房产信息。' . ($canCreate ? ' <a href="/properties/create" class="alert-link">点击这里创建第一个房产</a>' : '') . '
            </div>';
        } else {
            foreach ($properties as $property) {
                $vacancyRate = $property['total_rooms'] > 0 ? round(($property['vacant_rooms'] / $property['total_rooms']) * 100, 1) : 0;
                $statusBadge = $this->getPropertyStatusBadge($property['status']);
                
                $propertiesTable .= '
                <tr>
                    <td>' . $property['id'] . '</td>
                    <td>
                        <a href="/properties/' . $property['id'] . '" class="text-decoration-none">
                            <strong>' . htmlspecialchars($property['name']) . '</strong>
                        </a>
                        <div class="text-muted small">' . htmlspecialchars($property['address']) . '</div>
                    </td>
                    <td>
                        <span class="badge bg-secondary">' . htmlspecialchars($property['type']) . '</span>
                    </td>
                    <td>
                        <div class="d-flex align-items-center">
                            <div class="me-2">' . $property['occupied_rooms'] . '/' . $property['total_rooms'] . '</div>
                            <div class="progress flex-grow-1" style="height: 6px;">
                                <div class="progress-bar ' . ($vacancyRate > 30 ? 'bg-success' : ($vacancyRate > 10 ? 'bg-warning' : 'bg-danger')) . '" 
                                     role="progressbar" 
                                     style="width: ' . (100 - $vacancyRate) . '%">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <small class="text-muted">空置率: ' . $vacancyRate . '%</small>
                    </td>
                    <td>¥' . number_format($property['monthly_rent'], 2) . '</td>
                    <td>' . htmlspecialchars($property['owner_name']) . '</td>
                    <td>' . $statusBadge . '</td>
                    <td>
                        <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                            <a href="/properties/' . $property['id'] . '" class="btn btn-outline-primary">
                                <i class="bi bi-eye"></i>
                            </a>
                            <a href="/properties/' . $property['id'] . '/edit" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
                                <i class="bi bi-pencil"></i>
                            </a>
                            ' . ($isAdmin ? '
                            <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-danger" onclick="confirmDelete(' . $property['id'] . ')">
                                <i class="bi bi-trash"></i>
                            </button>' : '') . '
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>';
            }
        }
        
        return '<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>房产管理 - 收租管理系统</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/css/bootstrap.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/css/bootstrap-icons.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/css/custom.css">
    <style>
        .property-card {
            border: none;
            box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
            transition: all 0.3s;
            height: 100%;
        }
        
        .property-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
        }
        
        .property-header {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4f46e5 0%, #7c3aed 100%);

            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;

/**
 * 收租管理系统 - 房产管理控制器
 *

namespace App\Controllers;

use App\Core\Response;
use App\Core\HttpException;

class PropertyController
{
    /**
     * 显示房产列表
     * 
     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    public function index(): Response
    {
        // 检查用户是否已登录
        if (!auth()->check()) {
            throw HttpException::unauthorized('请先登录');
        }
        
        $user = auth()->user();
        $isAdmin = auth()->isAdmin();
        $isLandlord = auth()->isLandlord();
        
        // 获取房产列表（这里使用模拟数据）
        $properties = $this->getProperties($user, $isAdmin);
        
        $html = $this->propertyListTemplate($properties, $user, $isAdmin);
        return Response::html($html);
    }

     *

     */

        // 检查用户是否已登录

            throw HttpException::unauthorized('请先登录');
        }
        
        // 检查权限：只有管理员和房东可以创建房产
        if (!auth()->isAdmin() && !auth()->isLandlord()) {
            throw HttpException::forbidden('您没有权限创建房产');
        }
        
        $user = auth()->user();
        
        $html = $this->propertyFormTemplate('创建房产', null, $user);
        return Response::html($html);
    }

    /**

     *

     * @return Response 响应对象
     */
    public function destroy(int $id): Response
    {

        if (!auth()->check()) {

        }

     * @param bool $isAdmin 是否是管理员

     */
    private function getProperties(array $user, bool $isAdmin): array
    {

                return $property['owner_id'] == $user['id'];
            });

        return array_values($properties);
    }
    
    /**
     * 根据ID获取房产信息
     * 
     * @param int $id 房产ID
     * @param array $user 用户数据
     * @param bool $isAdmin 是否是管理员
     * @return array|null 房产信息
     */
    private function getPropertyById(int $id, array $user, bool $isAdmin): ?array
    {
        $properties = $this->getProperties($user, $isAdmin);
        
        foreach ($properties as $property) {
            if ($property['id'] == $id) {
                return $property;
            }
        }
        
        return null;
    }
    
    /**
     * 获取房产状态徽章
     * 
     * @param string $status 状态
     * @return string HTML徽章
     */
    private function getPropertyStatusBadge(string $status): string
    {
        $badges = [
            '正常' => '<span class="badge bg-success">正常</span>',
            '维护中' => '<span class="badge bg-warning">维护中</span>',
            '停用' => '<span class="badge bg-danger">停用</span>',
            '出租中' => '<span class="badge bg-info">出租中</span>',
            '空置' => '<span class="badge bg-secondary">空置</span>'
        ];
        
        return $badges[$status] ?? '<span class="badge bg-secondary">' . htmlspecialchars($status) . '</span>';
    }
    
    /**
     * 房产列表模板
     * 
     * @param array $properties 房产列表
     * @param array $user 用户数据
     * @param bool $isAdmin 是否是管理员
     * @return string HTML内容
     */
    private function propertyListTemplate(array $properties, array $user, bool $isAdmin): string
    {
        $userName = htmlspecialchars($user['real_name'] ?? $user['username']);
        $canCreate = $isAdmin || auth()->isLandlord();
        
        // 生成房产表格
        $propertiesTable = '';
        if (empty($properties)) {
            $propertiesTable = '
            <div class="alert alert-info">
                <i class="bi bi-info-circle me-2"></i>
                暂无房产信息。' . ($canCreate ? ' <a href="/properties/create" class="alert-link">点击这里创建第一个房产</a>' : '') . '
            </div>';
        } else {
            foreach ($properties as $property) {
                $vacancyRate = $property['total_rooms'] > 0 ? round(($property['vacant_rooms'] / $property['total_rooms']) * 100, 1) : 0;

                $propertiesTable .= '
                <tr>
                    <td>' . $property['id'] . '</td>

                        <a href="/properties/' . $property['id'] . '" class="text-decoration-none">
                            <strong>' . htmlspecialchars($property['name']) . '</strong>

                    </td>
                    <td>
                        <span class="badge bg-secondary">' . htmlspecialchars($property['type']) . '</span>
                    </td>
                    <td>
                        <div class="d-flex align-items-center">
                            <div class="me-2">' . $property['occupied_rooms'] . '/' . $property['total_rooms'] . '</div>
                            <div class="progress flex-grow-1" style="height: 6px;">
                                <div class="progress-bar ' . ($vacancyRate > 30 ? 'bg-success' : ($vacancyRate > 10 ? 'bg-warning' : 'bg-danger')) . '" 
                                     role="progressbar" 
                                     style="width: ' . (100 - $vacancyRate) . '%">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <small class="text-muted">空置率: ' . $vacancyRate . '%</small>
                    </td>
                    <td>¥' . number_format($property['monthly_rent'], 2) . '</td>
                    <td>' . htmlspecialchars($property['owner_name']) . '</td>
                    <td>' . $statusBadge . '</td>
                    <td>
                        <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                            <a href="/properties/' . $property['id'] . '" class="btn btn-outline-primary">
                                <i class="bi bi-eye"></i>
                            </a>
                            <a href="/properties/' . $property['id'] . '/edit" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
                                <i class="bi bi-pencil"></i>
                            </a>
                            ' . ($isAdmin ? '
                            <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-danger" onclick="confirmDelete(' . $property['id'] . ')">
                                <i class="bi bi-trash"></i>
                            </button>' : '') . '
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>';
            }
        }
